calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL TRIAL DE NOVO WITH APPELLANT MICHAEL G. HOUSEMAN PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL A. LEVY, ESQ. (SBN 269066) AND RESPONDENT LVC247, INC. REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL RICHARD MARKS (#310795).

10:05 A.M.: THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH; ALL PARTIES ARE ADMINISTERED THE OATH BY THE CLERK. COUNSEL R. MARKS PRESENTS A BRIEF STATEMENT OF THE CASE AND PRESENTS GROUP EXHIBITS TO THE COURT FOR ITS READING AND REVIEW.

10:17 A.M.: COUNSEL LEVY THE PRESENTS STATEMENTS TO THE COURT ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT MICHAEL HOUSEMAN UNTIL 10:31 A.M.

10:37 A.M.: AFTER HEARING TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER REVIEWING ALL STATEMENTS PRESENTED, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL TO BE NOTIFIED BY MAIL OF THE COURT'S DECISION; NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT.

VJ HON. LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (Dept.505).
